name: G Pen Hyer Vaporizer
summary: A dual-use desktop-style portable for concentrate and dry herb with a quartz heater and water-piece compatibility, for patients who want big vapour at home.
description: The G Pen Hyer is a larger portable that pairs a full quartz heating element with any glass-on-glass water piece, so it sits between a portable and a desktop rig. Swappable quartz and dry-herb tanks let you switch between concentrate and flower, and the 6,000mAh battery with USB-C pass-through charging keeps it running through long sessions. Three-button operation and a five-LED interface keep setup simple, and it comes with a 14mm glass adapter and travel bag. For a UK patient who wants serious, water-filtered vapour at home but still values some portability, the Hyer is a capable dual-format device.
